basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has released the official Research Associate I Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 on a contract basis. Candidates with a Ph.D. in Biotechnology, Biosciences, Biochemistry, Bioengineering, Biophysics, or a relevant discipline, or M.Sc./ M.Tech./ M.E. with at least 3 years of relevant research experience and an SCI-indexed publication can apply online on or before 20 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are a

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Biotechnology / Biosciences / Biochemistry / Bioengineering / Biophysics or relevant discipline, M.Sc/M.Tech/ME with at least 3 years relevant research experience and SCI-indexed publication
qualification.details: Ph.D. degree in Biotechnology / Biosciences / Biochemistry / Bioengineering / Biophysics or any relevant discipline OR M.Sc/ M.Tech/ ME degree in Biotechnology / Biosciences / Biochemistry / Bioengineering / Biophysics or any relevant discipline with at least 3 years of relevant research experience (post MSc/ MTech/ ME) and at least one research publication in an SCI-indexed journal.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Research Associate-I position at IIT Kanpur is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. degree in Biotechnology, Biosciences, Biochemistry, Bioengineering, Biophysics, or a related field. Alternatively, an M.Sc/M.Tech/ME degree with at least 3 years of relevant research experience and an SCI-indexed publication is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Research Associate-I job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the official IIT Kanpur website. The application link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Associate-I in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Research Associate-I position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016.

faq.question: Q9. Does the notification mention any age limit relaxation?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.Rect./R&D/2026/142.
